title: Add vulnerability exception governance and CI prod-audit gate

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Starting phase 3: add vulnerability exception documentation, enforce production-only high/critical audit gate in CI, and keep full audit visible as non-blocking output.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Phase 3 completed: added dashboard/docs/security-vulnerability-exceptions.md documenting active dev-toolchain high/critical exception and review cadence (next review June 13, 2026). Added dashboard package scripts ci:security and audit:full:report. Updated .github/workflows/ci.yaml with new dashboard-security-audit job: blocking prod-only high/critical gate via npm run ci:security, plus non-blocking full audit artifact upload.

comments.author: derek
comments.text: Validation summary: npm ci succeeds from clean install state; ci:security (npm audit --omit=dev --audit-level=high) passes with 0 high/critical in production graph; full audit remains 52 total (15 low, 23 moderate, 12 high, 2 critical). App health checks passed: npm run build:fast and npm test (82 suites, 606 tests).
